full_text:
Liu Bao 劉豹
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Bao (劉豹). United many Hun tribes so Deng Ai suggest stirring up trouble. Father of Liu Yuan. Liu Bao was affiliated with Xiongnu.
